chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 6001 of 2025 C.P No. D- 1827 of 2025. ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No. 25213/25. 2. For hearing of main case. 12.02.2026 Mr. Munawar Juna, Advocate for Petitioner in CP No. D- 6001/2025. Mr. Muhammad Talha Abbasi, Advocate for Petitioner in CP No. D- 1827/2025. Mr. Faizan Memon, Advocate. Mr. Muhammad Hisham Mahar, AAG. ---------- A counter affidavit has been submitted on behalf of the Respondents Nos.2 and 3 enclosing documents relating to the Auction held for the period w.e.f 01.07.2025 to 30.06.2026 in relation to the Cattle Piri at Asso Goth, Malir, UC-2, for which purpose the Petitioner in C.P No.D- 6001/2025 had preferred that matter. A copy thereof has been provided to Counsel for the Petitioner. Under such circumstances, it appears that the purpose of that Petition stands served. The same stands disposed of accordingly. Learned counsel for the Petitioner in C.P No. D- 1827/2025 submits that the same has also become infructuous and is not being pressed any further. In view of such Statement, that matter also stands dismissed. Office to place a copy of this Order in the connected Petition listed above. Judge Judge Ayaz
